note: outreach_email artifact has no recipient email address. The LLM cannot fabricate real email addresses — this is by design. To send: open this file, add the correct 'to' address, and call _handle_send_outreach_batch() directly or re-queue with recipient_email set.
subject: Goranson Bain Ausley — Visibility into Client Feedback
body: I've noticed that your firm has multiple attorneys with individual Avvo profiles, which can lead to fragmented client feedback. This fragmentation may create blind spots in understanding client sentiment across your practice. Clarion specializes in converting client reviews into structured governance briefs that highlight these patterns. Our briefs provide actionable insights tailored for leadership, ensuring that no critical feedback goes unnoticed. If you're open to it, I can walk through what that would look like using a sample of your firm's public reviews.
